# `docs/legal_app/backend`

This folder documents the source tree at `docs/legal_app/backend/`.

## Modules

- [`__init__.py`](__init__.py.md) — 0 public. _No overview._
- [`assist.py`](assist.py.md) — 6 public, 5 internal. Lawyer-assist endpoints: summary + translation (Phase 3.2).
- [`audit.py`](audit.py.md) — 3 public. Audit log for RBAC + team-management actions (Phase 2.3, spec §5.3).
- [`auth.py`](auth.py.md) — 16 public, 4 internal. Authentication for AG Lex — bcrypt + JWT.
- [`builder.py`](builder.py.md) — 4 public, 7 internal. Document builder: Claude generates a real Ukrainian legal document
- [`calendar_routes.py`](calendar_routes.py.md) — 1 public. Phase 2.4 — calendar aggregator.
- [`cases_acl.py`](cases_acl.py.md) — 10 public, 1 internal. Phase 2.4 — row-level access control for Matters.
- [`claude_client.py`](claude_client.py.md) — 3 public, 2 internal. Anthropic SDK wrapper for AG Lex.
- [`codex.py`](codex.py.md) — 2 public, 2 internal. Codex inventory + health checks (Fix 3).
- [`config.py`](config.py.md) — 2 public. AG Lex backend settings.
- [`contract_analysis.py`](contract_analysis.py.md) — 5 public, 6 internal. Per-contract risk analysis (Phase 3.1).
- [`crud.py`](crud.py.md) — 13 public, 2 internal. Generic SQL CRUD + FastAPI router factory for Phase 2.2 entities.
- [`database.py`](database.py.md) — 4 public. SQLite connection + schema for AG Lex.
- [`documents.py`](documents.py.md) — 18 public, 1 internal. Contract ingestion: PDF/DOCX → Markdown → sections + token stats.
- [`drafts.py`](drafts.py.md) — 8 public, 3 internal. Draft documents — custom router with personal / team scoping.
- [`main.py`](main.py.md) — 14 public, 4 internal. AG Lex FastAPI app — single-origin: serves /api/* JSON and the Vite build at /.
- [`matters_routes.py`](matters_routes.py.md) — 19 public, 5 internal. Phase 2.4 — custom router for /api/matters with row-level access control.
- [`mock_ai.py`](mock_ai.py.md) — 5 public. Deterministic fixtures used when AGLEX_MOCK_AI=1.
- [`models.py`](models.py.md) — 7 public. Schema for Phase 2.2 workspace data.
- [`notifications_routes.py`](notifications_routes.py.md) — 3 public. Phase 2.4 — notifications for the bell + the "Вас додали" badge.
- [`pipeline.py`](pipeline.py.md) — 2 public, 2 internal. RAG pipeline: search → Claude → citation check.
- [`prompts.py`](prompts.py.md) — 0 public. System prompts for AG Lex.
- [`rbac.py`](rbac.py.md) — 8 public. Server-side RBAC for AG Lex.
- [`realtime.py`](realtime.py.md) — 10 public, 3 internal. Phase 2.4 — WebSocket fan-out for realtime case collaboration.
- [`reconciliation.py`](reconciliation.py.md) — 2 public, 4 internal. Contract ↔ Handover (Table 3) reconciliation.
- [`search.py`](search.py.md) — 3 public, 6 internal. Hybrid codex search: vector (sqlite-vec) + keyword (FTS5) fused via RRF.
- [`team.py`](team.py.md) — 11 public, 2 internal. Team module routes (spec §5.3): members + permissions + audit.
